---

name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new test pattern for the ECH NGINX lab stack
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
-------------

## Summary

Describe the proposed improvement.

## Problem being solved

What problem does this solve?

## Proposed approach

Describe how you think this could work.

## Use case

Who would benefit from this?

Examples:

* Direct-origin ECH testing
* NGINX/OpenSSL ECH build improvements
* Docker Compose hardening
* DNS HTTPS/SVCB record handling
* Cloudflare DNS-only automation
* curl/OpenSSL validation
* Relay-fronted direct-origin ECH
* Documentation clarity

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternatives you considered.

## Security and privacy considerations

Does this change affect:

* TLS termination location?
* ECH private/generated key handling?
* DNS privacy?
* SNI privacy?
* Destination IP visibility?
* CDN/WAF involvement?
* Relay or tunnel trust boundaries?

## Willingness to test

* [ ] I can test this change.
* [ ] I can provide logs or sanitized output.
* [ ] I can submit a pull request.

## Additional context

Add any other context, references, or examples.
